bead.title: checks: backfill production-reachability — internal/server (12 unreached)
bead.description:
Decomposed from REACH-BACKFILL (ddx-83440482). The Go production-reachability check (library/checks/go-production-reachability) flagged 12 symbol(s) in package `internal/server` as unreachable from cli/ entry roots (deadcode RTA).

Symbols:
- internal/server/federation_spoke.go:88 — WithSpokeHeartbeatInterval
- internal/server/federation_spoke.go:93 — WithSpokeHeartbeatJitter
- internal/server/federation_spoke.go:98 — WithSpokeStatePath
- internal/server/federation_spoke.go:103 — WithSpokeHTTPClient
- internal/server/federation_spoke.go:109 — WithSpokeSelfURL
- internal/server/federation_spoke.go:115 — WithSpokeNodeID
- internal/server/reported_workers_adapter.go:27 — reportedWorkersAdapter.setNow
- internal/server/server.go:2177 — Server.execStore
- internal/server/server.go:2844 — Server.loadSessions
- internal/server/singleton.go:97 — readAddrFilePID
- internal/server/worker_ingest.go:225 — workerIngestRegistry.close
- internal/server/workers.go:1735 — workerHarnessHealthy

For each: WIRE (add to production call graph) or DELETE (genuinely obsolete). If neither is clear within ~15 min, annotate `// wiring:pending <follow-up-bead-id>` and file a follow-up bead.

Decision rule: if the originating bead's AC describes desired runtime behavior → WIRE; if speculative or design has moved on → DELETE.

Initial-violations evidence: .ddx/executions/20260503T124553-282667f7/initial-violations.json
bead.acceptance:
1. Each of the 12 listed symbols is either wired into the production call graph reachable from main() OR deleted (with originating bead reopened/closed-as-obsolete as appropriate).
2. Any remaining wiring:pending annotations cite open follow-up beads.
3. After landing: deadcode RTA (`go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./...` from cli/) reports zero remaining dead symbols in `internal/server`.
4. cd cli && go test ./... green.
5. Decisions log written to .ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md (one line per symbol: WIRE|DELETE|PENDING <reason>).
